管理平台级用户账号，包括创建、编辑、启用/禁用、重置密码等操作: Manage platform user accounts including create, edit, enable/disable, and reset password
用户名仅允许字母、数字和下划线: Username can only contain letters, numbers and underscores
密码长度至少 6 个字符: Password must be at least 6 characters
手机号长度不超过 20 个字符: Phone number must not exceed 20 characters
新密码已生成，请妥善保管：: New password has been generated. Please keep it safe:
平台用户管理用于管理系统级管理员账号。支持创建、编辑、删除用户，以及启用/禁用状: Platform User Management is used to manage system-level administrator accounts. Supports creating, editing, deleting users, as well as enabling/disabling status toggle and password reset.
登录账号，创建后不可修改，仅允许字母、数字和下划线: Login account, cannot be modified after creation, only letters, numbers and underscores allowed
用户展示名称，用于界面显示: User display name, shown in the UI
用户邮箱地址，用于通知和密码找回: User email address, used for notifications and password recovery
用户关联的平台角色，决定其权限范围: Platform roles associated with the user, determining permission scope
已启用/已禁用，禁用后用户无法登录: Enabled/Disabled, disabled users cannot log in
新员工入职时创建平台管理员账号: Create platform admin accounts when new employees join
员工离职或岗位调整时禁用/启用账号: Disable/enable accounts when employees leave or change positions
用户忘记密码时重置密码: Reset password when users forget their password
按角色或时间范围筛选查询用户: Filter users by role or time range
step_search: Enter keywords or select status in the search bar, click 'Search' to filter the user list
step_advanced: Click 'Advanced Search' to expand more filters (role, creation time) for precise filtering
step_create: Click 'Create' button, fill in username, password, display name, select roles and save
step_edit: Click 'Edit' button in the list to modify display name, email, phone or roles
step_status: Click 'More' → 'Enable' or 'Disable' to toggle user status
step_reset_pwd: Click 'More' → 'Reset Password', the system auto-generates a new password and displays it
step_batch: Select multiple users, then use 'Batch Enable' or 'Batch Disable' buttons in the toolbar
step_delete: Click 'More' → 'Delete', confirm to permanently delete the user
